title: Plastic Model Online Shop
description: My first project using Laravel and Sql. It features basic online shop functionalities - browsing, buying products, and check-out.

title: Multilayer Perceptron from Scratch
description: I implemented an MLP from scratch using Java. I used Back Propagation, Genetic Algorithms, and Particle Swarm Optimization to train a network.

title: The Design Award, IDC Robocon 2022
description: I worked online (due to COVID19) with members from China, South Korea and Mexico to design a robot. Over the course of 10 days, I learned to work online effectively with international members, and to design a successful robot in Unity utilizing its Physics engine and 3D modelling features.

title: 4th Place, Thai National Kibo Robot Programming Challenge
description: I was in Team LYNX that was ranked 4th place in the Thai national level. The competition involves controlling the robot in zero-g to accurately shoot the target using laser. The target is found using OpenCV and computer vision.

title: 3rd Place, Faipa Hackathon
description: Faipa Hackathon was a hackathon which students and start-ups gathered to solve the wildfire crisis in Northern Thailand using satellite technology and big data. We are awarded third place for our solution in integrating hotspot data from satellite, sensor(IoT), communication and wildfire preparation plan.

title: CARIN
description: It is a single-player online strategy game. It features genetic code parser and interpreter for game's characters, and multi-threaded server support for concurrent playing games.
techstack: Game - Java Spring WebSocket / React / TypeScript / CSS / HTML

title: TCAS Countdown Twitter Bot
description: 14k followers and counting... A twitter bot that tweets days until Thai university exams (TCAS).
techstack: Bot - Node.js / AWS Lambda / AWS EventBridge / Twitter API

title: Generative Art Gallery
description: A web gallery for interesting generative arts created by me.
techstack: Web, Generative Art - p5.js / Processing / Jekyll
